name.ja: <ruby>霊<rt>れい</rt></ruby><ruby>術<rt>じゅつ</rt></ruby><ruby>精<rt>せい</rt></ruby><ruby>錬<rt>れん</rt></ruby>

requirement.en: Send 1 Spellcaster Type monster with 500 or 1900 ATK and 1500 DEF from your hand to the Graveyard.

effect.en: Draw 2 cards. Then, you can Special Summon 1 Level 5 Spellcaster Type monster from your hand face-up to your field. This turn, you cannot attack with Level 9 or higher monsters.
